title: Ranwid the Elder
description:
You are approached by the [purple]oldest person you have ever seen[/purple].
[sine]"We meet once more... it's me, Ranwid!"[/sine]

You do not know this man.
conditions: All players must have at least 100 Gold
All players must have at least 1 Potion
All players must have at least 1 tradable Relic
notes: Ranwid the Elder is an opportunistic trader who accepts items from the player in exchange for relics. Each choice has a different yield: potions and gold grant 1 relic, while trading an existing relic yields 2 relics, making it the most valuable option if you have a relic you're willing to part with. Potions and relics cannot be removed during this event.
